ENONewContentHdr.Title: New Content Panel
ENONewContentHdr.ShortHelp: Creates a new object from the listed Types
ENONewContentHdr.LongHelp: In the dialog box, click on the required type to launch creation dialog.
ENONewContentInputTypeHdr.Title: New from Type Name
ENONewContentInputTypeHdr.ShortHelp: Creates a new object from input type name
ENONewContentInputTypeHdr.LongHelp:
In the dialog box, enter the required type name

Click Create button to launch creation dialog.
ENONewAllContentHdr.Title: New Any Content
ENONewAllContentHdr.ShortHelp: Creates a new object from any type implementing New protocol.
ENONewAllContentHdr.LongHelp: In the dialog box, click on the required type to launch creation dialog.
ENONewDummyHdr.Title: New MockDocument
ENONewDummyHdr.ShortHelp: Creates a new MockDocument object. MockDocument Type should be previously created in database.
ENONewDummyHdr.LongHelp: In the dialog box, fill the required details in the form.
